title: Tees Maar Khan
subTitle: Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Saina
subTitle: Professional badminton player Saina Nehwal wins more than 24 international titles and achieves the top world spot in 2015.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: IPC 376
subTitle: A police officer looks into an informer who can predict future murders in a mysterious way. Soon, she unearths a sinister murder mystery that leads to a shocking truth.

title: Aravinda Sametha
subTitle: A young man sets out to avenge his father's death but soon realises that violence is not the key to his salvation. His life changes when he meets another man, who helps him rediscover himself.

title: Andaaz
subTitle: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another man, Raj moves to Cape Town. He eventually agrees to marry Jiya but is shocked to find that she is Kajal's widowed sister-in-law.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
subTitle: A woman is forced to abandon her Bollywood dreams after her boyfriend sells her to a brothel. As time passes, she builds strong connections in the criminal underworld and rises to power.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

subTitle: Zee Cinema HD

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Valimai
subTitle: Arjun, a police officer, sets out on a mission to hunt down a group of violent bikers after they are involved in a theft and murder. When a city's crime rate rises, it is up to Arjun, a police officer, to restore order.

title: Encounter Man 2
subTitle: An NRI, who is on the verge of bankruptcy, learns that he owns a palace in India and sets out to sell it. However, his visit to India turns into an insane journey when he gets kidnapped.

title: Apna Sapna Money Money
subTitle: Arjun and Shivani are in love, but Shivani's father will never let them marry each other. Later chaos ensues when Arjun enlists the help of his conman cousin, Kishan, to unite him with Shivani.

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: Mahaabali
subTitle: Seenu's debt-driven escape to Dubai accidentally reroutes him to Hyderabad. Upon arrival, a shocking discovery leads him to orchestrate a cunning plan.

title: A Flying Jatt
subTitle: Donning a mighty cape and a heart of gold, a quirky Punjabi superhero whooshes through low-altitude escapades and fights the humongous villain who threatens the world.

title: Vivah
subTitle: Poonam, a traditional young woman, gets engaged to Prem, a wealthy man. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and leaves Poonam with first degree burns.

title: Echo
subTitle: Desperation sets in when Prakash's failing marriage is threatened by something otherworldly, prompting him to resort to black magic. He soon uncovers shocking family revelations.

title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: 102 Not Out
subTitle: Dattatraya Vakharia, a 102-year-old man with the heart of a child, lives with his 75-year-old son, Babulal. Full of energy, he aims to break the world record for the oldest man alive.

subTitle: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

subTitle: After being abandoned by his sons, an elderly father grappling with dementia embarks on a life-changing journey. He is aided by a cunning thief who is determined to reunite him with his family.
